title: Hypertension genomics and cardiovascular prevention.
author: Ng FL Warren HR Caulfield MJ
content: S-EPMC6123211 PMC6123211 Hypertension genomics and cardiovascular prevention. Hypertension continues to be a major risk factor for global mortality, and recent genome-wide association studies (GWAS) have expanded in size, leading to the identification of further genetic loci influencing blood
